title: Spatial Analysis of FAP Gene Expression in Breast Cancer.
snippet: Fibroblast Activation Protein (FAP) is a key marker of Cancer-Associated Fibroblasts (CAFs) and a promising target for cancer theranostics. However, its expression in both stromal and tumor cells complicates therapeutic strategies. This study employed spatial transcriptomics to analyze FAP gene expression patterns in luminal breast cancer, revealing distinc...
